clinic: Kensington International Clinic - La Maison Medicale

reviews.text: Booked appointment and the doctor didn’t turn up at all! spent two days chasing the appointment and when we did speak, he didn’t actually listen to us.  Was given assurances before hand he would deal with issue, for him to turn around and request information and ask us to book for a future appointment.  Information that we could have provided easily before the appointment had it been requested.  Very poor performance and definitely one to avoid.

I booked on line (and paid 300£) for a home visit by Dr Yu Zhen Lau on Dec 27th. The doctor called 10 minutes before the visit just to say it would take too much time to come (given the rain...) and cancelled the appointment, blaming the management of the clinic who apparently had not informed her of the booking. A very unprofessional clinic.

I will not use this service moving forward. I cannot believe how unprofessional and disgusting the man who answered the phone was. this has no put me off from wanting to come here in the future. he claimed when I asked for his name he is called "jack" awful behaviour for a person who is supposed to be a receptionist and polite to customers and patients. stay far away. They need to think of getting someone new or training in customer services would be a start.

This is a review for Dr Vohwinkel, child psychiatrist. We consulted her for our 11 yr old son who was suffering from depression. "Pushy and doesn't listen" is his description of Dr Vohwinkel. We think the same, and will add: not supportive. …
Dreadful place got thread veins. My doctor retired so I came here. Waste of money. 2 sessions ZERO IMPROVEMENT.  Do NOT WASTE your money.
TO AVOID ABSOLUTELY. No follow-up with tests, front deck messy, prices too high. We are very displeased with the services.
Terrible experience. With Dr Bouvresse Not even matching the basic hygiene standards . To avoid at all costs !!!
Not satisfied at all. Like I paid for nothing.

Having an expensive service is fine, but only if the necessary effort is made to ensure the patient is satisfied with their care. I still haven't heard anything about my test results after more than two weeks and several calls to the …

I went to the medical center during my stay in London because my body was constantly itchy. I had blisters on my hands and itched in very specific spots. The dermatologist I saw told me I was simply anxious and had hives. She gave me a …

The office is very pleasant and the reception was excellent. However, I absolutely do not recommend Dr. Vohwinkel. His diagnosis was rushed and curt, he offered no parental support, and he used harsh words in front of the child. In short, a shocking lack of professionalism.

After an appointment with Dr. Bouvresse (dermatology)

Terribly rude, unhygienic (blood and pus stains!), and he'll charge you for a full consultation (£130) only to tell you to go see his colleagues at another clinic! Unacceptable lack of professionalism, not to mention an extremely unpleasant receptionist…

Please don't go there; let's not encourage this kind of dubious medical practice.

Stay away!!! Absolute rip-off
The receptionist was very friendly. However, the GP service was a disaster. It took exactly 10 minutes; I might as well have thrown my £120 in the bin, it was the same thing. Avoid at all costs!
£120 for a 20-minute general practitioner consultation, shame on you.

As we have no record of you in our system and looking at the same kind of reviews published all at the same time, we consider this review to be defamatory and we will take the appropriate legal steps if you don't remove it.

I have been seeing 2 good doctors at La maison medicale for 4 years. They were doing a good job until they decided to make many changes which are not in patients' best interest: mainly online appointments for the rhumatology department, no more neurologist.. Reduced slots which makes it impossible to have an appointment. Easy to get a blood test but having an appointment to discuss the result is hard work: Why should I even have a blood test in this case? There are two secretaries: the man is very polite but the woman rushes people to take appointments, speaks to people in a rude manner. 5 discusions in one week with this person  was just a disaster. La maison médicale moved from a place where you would receive great level of care to fast food version of a health centre.
